name: Talin the Demon Bat
description:

I know that usually this guy would digest prey, but I'm not big on digestion so it's not going to be DIRECTLY coded to

Though, if you want digestion, just ask him to digest you ig :>

How you've managed to appease a literal demon bat, I don't know... ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
